notes: Full dinner menu captured (appetizers, soup/salad, entrees, handmade pastas, sides, desserts) with the menu's own dietary marks preserved: GF/gf gluten-free, VGT vegetarian, VGN vegan, DF dairy-free, plus '-O' optional variants (e.g. GFO = GF option). Two-price items are smaller/larger portion (smaller in price_cents). Wagyu steaks listed as four cuts -> four entree rows. Wine and cocktail lists not detailed on the page; beverages left empty.
